title: Thermo Fisher (TMO) — Intrinsic Value & Prospect Score
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Thermo Fisher using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what TMO is really worth. Economic Prospect Score: 70/100 — Strong Prospect.
verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use an 8.5% discount rate?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026. Compiled by Gemini 3.1.

prospectVerdictDetail: The picks-and-shovels play for life sciences — dominant in lab equipment, reagents, and CRO services. Post-pandemic destocking is ending.
prospectKeyRisks: Biotech funding downturn reducing instrument and consumable demand
China anti-corruption campaign reducing life science spending in Asia
Post-pandemic destocking cycle extending longer than expected
prospectKeyCatalysts: Biotech funding recovery driving instrument demand rebound
Bioproduction and cell/gene therapy tools growing 15%+
AI-driven drug discovery increasing demand for analytical instruments
prospectMethodology: Score is based on three pillars: Competitive Momentum (0-35), Moat Durability (0-35), and Sentiment & Catalysts (0-30), totaling 0-100. Each pillar is broken into individually scored factors with transparent rationale. Data sources include FY2025 10-K filings, analyst consensus estimates, news sentiment analysis, and competitive landscape assessment. The score is forward-looking and represents economic prospect over a 2-3 year horizon.
